title: Attack Beacon grants attack dice to low AL non-effect creatures

card.rawText: Creatures with a base AL of 6 or less and no card effect gain the following: Atk Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.target: Creatures with base AL 6 or less and no card effect

plan.title: Attack Beacon grants attack dice to low AL non-effect creatures
plan.summary: Play Attack Beacon as field magic and verify an eligible low-AL non-effect creature receives one extra Atk Dice Roll.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 because it has no card effects and base AL 3.

steps: Player 1 plays Attack Beacon as field magic.
Read player_1 primary effective attack dice.
Run a follow-up battle with the eligible primary creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack Beacon remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm creatures with card effects or base AL above 6 do not receive this aura.
Confirm battle damage does not double-count the attack dice aura through both effective stats and battle suggestions.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the effective stat layer for the printed restriction; battle damage double-counting needs a separate adapter pass.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Attack Beacon field aura for eligible creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
